stories.local_rule: Prefer the project's current/ folder when present.

reels.local_rule: Prefer the project's current/ folder when present; otherwise use the approved reel project folder containing winner frames.

feed.local_rule: Prefer the project's current/ folder when present; otherwise use the approved feed project folder or explicitly supplied approved file set.

captions.local_rule: Use the explicitly supplied approved caption file or caption folder.

content_calendars.local_rule: Keep the project CSV under content-planning/ as the working copy, then publish or update the matching Google Sheet in Drive.

jay_invoice_sheets.local_rule: Use the existing invoice spreadsheets in this folder as the formatting reference, then copy the selected reference into a new monthly Google Sheet for Jay.
